head  
The representative starts with 250 brochures, each highlighting 5 applications, so the initial total is 250 × 5 = 1250 applications.  
They print an additional batch, which is 3 times the original amount, so the additional brochures are 250 × 3 = 750.  
The total number of brochures is 250 + 750 = 1000.  
Each brochure still highlights 5 applications, so the total number of applications is 1000 × 5 = 5000.  
The letter n appears 7 times in the response: in "250 × 5 = 1250", "3 times the original amount", "750", "1000", "5000", "n appears 7 times", and "the letter n".  
The response ends with the word "head".
